collectionRecords.title: Best Sellers
collectionRecords.description: Best Sellers are our most popular products, based on customer opinions and sales.

collectionRecords.title: Men's Fragrance
collectionRecords.description: Men, get ready! Our long-lasting fragrances closely mimic premium colognes—without the premium price. Just My Scent offers uncut fragrant body oils that are paraben-free, alcohol-free, and 100% vegan. Smell your best all day—whether you're heading to work, going on a date, or just running errands. Trust us, the compliments won’t stop coming!

collectionRecords.title: Unisex
collectionRecords.description: Our unisex fragrance embodies the perfect harmony of elegance and freshness, making it ideal for anyone seeking a balanced yet distinctive scent. Unisex fragrances offer a gender-neutral twist on the traditional interpretations of fragrance—blending notes that are clean and aromatic, slightly floral, warm amber, and grounded in woody or earthy undertones. Thoughtfully crafted to complement any personality and suit any occasion, these scents leave a lasting impression without overwhelming the senses.

collectionRecords.title: Women's Fragrance
collectionRecords.description: Fragrance that captures the essence of every woman—no matter her preferred scent. Whether bold, soft, floral, vanilla, earthy, or sweet, there's something just for you. Choose scents based on the season or your personal aroma style. With Just My Scent , you’ll discover the long-lasting fragrance you’ve been looking for. Turn heads when you walk by, welcome the compliments, or simply enjoy smelling amazing!

products.description: The opening notes of pistachio and almond provide an immediate rich aroma that tells you this will be a sensual perfume. Floral mid notes, in keeping with a summer theme. Jasmine is a classic perfume element that evokes tropical vibes. Its mix of fruitiness and musk makes it a well-balanced floral that’s universally loved. Heliotrope, while floral, is often perceived to smell like marshmallow or vanilla, so it goes well with the dessert theme. The perfume dries with strong notes of vanilla, salted caramel, and sandalwood. Its warm, inviting, sexy and indulgent fragrance calls to mind the luxury cabana at a high-end resort.
